name: John Doe
history: Longstanding difficult interactions with the patient's mother. Strained communication and delayed sharing of significant events within the family.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I enjoy myself too much, I will be scolded or criticized.
intermediate_belief_depression: I must not trust good times because they won't last.
coping_strategies: Avoids fully enjoying experiences and remains guarded to prevent disappointment.
situation: Preparing for an upcoming visit from parents.
auto_thought: I shouldn't enjoy myself too much or I'll be criticized.
behavior: Holds back in therapy sessions and social situations, remains guarded.
